full_text:
Xin Chang (Taiyong) 辛敞 (泰雍)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xin Chang (辛敞), styledTaiyong (泰雍). A follower of Cao Shuang, his sister warned him to stay loyal. Xin Chang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
